ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Central Depository Services (India) Limited (CDSL) has announced a recommended final dividend of ₹12.75 per equity share for the financial year 2025-2026, pending shareholder approval at the upcoming Annual General Meeting. The record date for determining eligible shareholders for this dividend is Friday, July 17, 2026, representing a routine corporate action to distribute profits to investors. No red flags or unusual material impacts are evident in this standard regulatory disclosure.
